headline.text: L1 Sollich 3 ran on *1 kettle for 90 minutes* after dual sensor failures — both kettles back online by 06:57.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 lost both kettles to damaged sensor connectors at 03:55 and 05:27, slowed to 60 RR on single kettle; maintenance replaced connectors and restored full capacity by 06:57. Sollich 2 completed Oreo trial with multiple enrober re-washes before allergen clearance at 06:04. Melting tank 1 squealing noise under investigation.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML3 replaced shredded cross conveyor belt at 14:32, back running by 14:51; second belt issue at 06:07 cleared by 06:12. FFS bobine collar misalignment fixed in 29 minutes at shift start. ML2 molding belt adjusted, 11-minute stop at 06:08.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 temper swings stabilized by 03:49 after multiple adjustments; B100A sensor tolerance adjusted for twisted-piece rejection at 07:16. ML4 compressor 1 faulting intermittently since 19:27, Sollich contacted; TG3 film jamming cleared with roll swap at 23:26; chocolate buildup in vibration area cleaned in 15 minutes at 02:32.

notes.text: Operator caught and tightened loose screw on motor M260 before failure.
Sollich 2 Oreo trial hit 2508 ppm at max tunnel speed; 9 pallets FG completed.
Film versions V5 and V6 can mix in master cases but not displays per QA.

resolved.title: Sollich 3 dual kettle sensor failure
resolved.summary: Kettle 1 top-door sensor connector damaged by moisture at 03:55, kettle 2 followed at 05:27; line slowed to 60 RR on single kettle while maintenance replaced 8-wire cable and connectors.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:57 — "Repairs are done and we are currently cooking in 2 kettles" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 enrober allergen test failures
resolved.summary: Enrober failed allergen swab at 04:17 after initial wash; white chocolate residue not releasing with oil, required brushing and multiple re-washes.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:04 — "Enrober allergens have all passed" (Karen Velastegui).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 Russell Finex filter clog
resolved.summary: Filter alarm at 09:40 during Oreo trial startup; team disassembled to clear suspected clog but found partially closed valve downstream.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:18 — valve opened, filter reassembled, "We are ready" (Erandy Garcilazo Ceja).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 Matrix belt trip on safety cable
resolved.summary: Matrix area belts stopped at 10:44 during Oreo trial; mezzanine safety cable had tripped.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:48 — "It was the safety cable on the mezzanine. Maintenance reset that and things are running" (Troy Baxter).

resolved.title: ML3 cross conveyor belt shredding
resolved.summary: Belt breaking apart and shedding material at 14:32; line down for replacement.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:51 — belt replaced, ATP passed, "Line start running" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: FFS bobine collar misalignment
resolved.summary: Film tracking and print issues on roll changes carried over from 2nd shift; collars measured unequal, needed adjustment at shift start to prevent recurrence.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 22:49 — collars adjusted, tracking and print reset, "Line is up" after 29 minutes DT (Gustavo Rodas).

resolved.title: ML3 belt issue at shift start
resolved.summary: Belt problem at 06:07 prevented startup; maintenance on-site.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:21 — "Line back up at 6:12" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: FFS print defect at midshift
resolved.summary: Print quality issue during first shift run.
resolved.resolution: Cleared same message — "Had a print issue, but resolved and line is running well" (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: ML3 missing wrench from shadow board
resolved.summary: Wrench #10 missing from pack area shadow board at 21:45.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 22:00 — "It was Recovered wrench 10" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML4 TG3 film jamming and rips
resolved.summary: Film jamming at 23:09, switched to rips at 23:21; speed lowered to 16 mpm.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 23:26 — "Switched film, readjusted lot code. TG3 is now running, we're back up to 18" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML1 temper instability
resolved.summary: Temper moving up and down starting at 02:08; team made multiple mixing-water adjustments and notified maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 03:49 — "Temper return to normal 0.3" (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML4 chocolate buildup causing mold noise
resolved.summary: Loud noises from molds after demolding at 02:32; chocolate buildup in vibration area pushing molds up.
resolved.resolution: Cleared after 10–15 min gap — removed 10 molds, ran gap to scrape buildup, "verified what it was" (Kimberly at 05:06:01). Chad suggested daily cleaning during capture test.

resolved.title: ML1 B100A sensor not rejecting doubles
resolved.summary: Sensor failing to kick off misaligned and double product at 07:08.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:16 — tolerance adjusted to detect twisted pieces, "So far, it has done well to kick these off" (Shawn Jewkes). Note: sensor not designed for doubles.

resolved.title: ML1 loose screw on motor M260
resolved.summary: Operator found loose screw during belt inspection at 06:58.
resolved.resolution: Cleared immediately — operator tightened screw on the spot; Preston: "Great catch! Thank you for stopping that before it became a bigger issue!"

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 melting tank 1 squealing noise
needs_attention.summary: Loud squealing noise from melting tank 1 reported at 05:00; maintenance has been informed.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified as of 05:00; no update on diagnosis or repair plan by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML2 pick and brush missing from shadow board
needs_attention.summary: Tools not returned to shadow board at end of 3rd shift.
needs_attention.status: Missing at 06:05 shadow board check; no recovery reported by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 sensor plug damaged, temporary fix
needs_attention.summary: Sensor plug on TG hit and broken out of socket at 14:19; pins straightened and reattached but connection not secured, will fall out if bumped.
needs_attention.status: Temporary fix in place as of 14:19 on 6/23; permanent repair not completed by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 compressor 1 intermittent faults
needs_attention.summary: Compressor 1 faulting repeatedly since 19:27 on 6/23; only compressor 1 affected, compressor 2 stable.
needs_attention.status: Preston sent email to Sollich for support at 20:25 on 6/23; faults recurring through window, no resolution yet.
